page_content:
Prerequisite: BMGT220 or BMGT210.

BMGT424 Advanced Accounting (3 Credits)

Advanced accounting theory applied to specialized topics and current problems. Emphasis on consolidated statements and partnership accounting.

Prerequisite: BMGT311.

BMGT428 Special Topics in Accounting (3 Credits) Selected advanced topics in Accounting. Repeatable to: 9 credits if content differs.
